mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_DEPARTMENT_MANAGE ( MANAGE_NO, CPNY_ID, DEPT_NO, LOCK_DATE, LOCK_ATTEN_FLAG, LOCK_ATTEN_NIGHT_FLAG, LOCK_OT_FLAG, LOCK_OT_NIGHT_FLAG, LOCK_ATTEN_EX_FLAG, LOCK_ATTEN_EX_NIGHT_FLAG, LOCK_ATTEN_ANNUAL_FLAG, LOCK_ATTEN_ANNUAL_NIGHT_FLAG, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, AFFIRM_FLAG ) VALUES ( AR_DEPARTMENT_MANAGE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{cpnyId}, #{deptNo}, #{lockDate}, #{lockAttenFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lockAttenNightFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lockOtFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lockOtNightFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lockAttenExFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lockAttenExNightFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lockAttenAnnualFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lockAttenAnnualNightFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{adminIP}, 1, 0, '0' )
mapper.update: UPDATE AR_DEPARTMENT_MANAGE SET LOCK_ATTEN_FLAG = #{lockAttenFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOCK_ATTEN_NIGHT_FLAG = #{lockAttenNightFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOCK_OT_FLAG = #{lockOtFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOCK_OT_NIGHT_FLAG = #{lockOtNightFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOCK_ATTEN_EX_FLAG = #{lockAttenExFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOCK_ATTEN_EX_NIGHT_FLAG = #{lockAttenExNightFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOCK_ATTEN_ANNUAL_FLAG = #{lockAttenAnnualFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOCK_ATTEN_ANNUAL_NIGHT_FLAG = #{lockAttenAnnualNightFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP} WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND DEPT_NO = #{deptNo} AND LOCK_DATE = #{lockDate}
